classification_basis: ClinicalTrials.gov registry record and API payload are treated as public registry data suitable for retained raw payloads, normalized section artifacts, source hashes, provenance locators, and structured extraction.

attribution.source_title: Targeting Cellular Senescence With Senolytics to Improve Skeletal Health in Older Humans
attribution.citation: ClinicalTrials.gov. Targeting Cellular Senescence With Senolytics to Improve Skeletal Health in Older Humans. NCT04313634.
attribution.required_notice: Attribute ClinicalTrials.gov and retain the NCT identifier in downstream records.

conditions: Public exports may include registry metadata, structured facts, hashes, provenance locators, and artifact manifests.
Public exports should not imply ClinicalTrials.gov endorsement of downstream synthesis.

remediation.policy: If an agent detects a rights conflict or receives a source-removal notice, remove retained artifacts from exports, preserve hashes and provenance locators, and route dependent records through a repair candidate.

classification_basis: PubMed metadata and abstract locators support citation, provenance, hashing, and structured metadata extraction. PMC identifies PMC11705617 as an NIHPA author manuscript, not a PMC Open Access article; repository policy treats public author-manuscript repository copies as artifact-eligible with attribution, hashes, source locators, structured extraction, and public exports limited to metadata, structured facts, and artifact manifests.

attribution.source_title: Effects of intermittent senolytic therapy on bone metabolism in postmenopausal women: a phase 2 randomized controlled trial

attribution.rights_holder: Authors / Nature Medicine / NIH Public Access
attribution.required_notice: Attribute the article citation, PMID, PMCID, DOI, PMC author-manuscript page, and publisher source page in downstream records.

license_or_terms.name: PMC author manuscript under NIH Public Access; not classified as PMC Open Access

conditions: Public exports may include citation metadata, source identifiers, provenance locators, hashes, source-rights metadata, artifact manifests, and structured extracted facts.
Public exports must not include retained article full text or normalized article markdown from this rights classification.

remediation.policy: If an agent detects a rights conflict or receives a source-removal notice, remove retained artifacts from exports, preserve hashes and provenance locators, and route dependent records through a repair candidate.
